response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold tales.
Tales show love.
Love shifts views.
Views change minds.
Minds grow wise.
Wise men learn.
Learn from pages.
Pages count high.
High counts mean.
Mean daily rates.
Rates stay fixed.
Fixed days pass.
Pass time quickly.
Quickly read more.
More pages come.
Come new stories.
Stories break rules.
Rules fade now.
Now comes math.
Math finds sums.
Sums equal four.
Four pages daily.
Daily work done.
Done with care.
Care brings growth.
Growth aids change.
Change needs time.
Time flies fast.
Fast reading helps.
Helps open hearts.
Hearts accept truth.
Truth sets free.
